name: stremio-dl
description: CLI tool to batch download entire seasons from Stremio addons

scripts.dev: bun run build:ui && bun run src/cli.ts
scripts.build: bun run build:ui && bun build --compile src/cli.ts --outfile stremio-dl
scripts.build:win: bun run build:ui && bun build --compile src/cli.ts --outfile stremio-dl-win.exe --target=bun-windows-x64
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && VER=$(node -e 'process.stdout.write(require("./package.json").version)') && git add package.json && git commit -m "v$VER" && git tag "v$VER"
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && VER=$(node -e 'process.stdout.write(require("./package.json").version)') && git add package.json && git commit -m "v$VER" && git tag "v$VER"
scripts.version:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && VER=$(node -e 'process.stdout.write(require("./package.json").version)') && git add package.json && git commit -m "v$VER" && git tag "v$VER"
scripts.release: git push origin main && git push origin --tags
